stories.title: 终于有人问名字
stories.source_range: inspired by early reputation and maker-identity scenes

sentences.chinese: 以前在市场里，很少有人问杂草叫什么。
sentences.english_helper: Before, very few people in the market asked what Weed was called.

sentences.chinese: 大家只看东西。
sentences.english_helper: People only looked at the items.

sentences.chinese: 买不买，也只看东西。
sentences.english_helper: Whether to buy or not also depended only on the items.

sentences.chinese: 杂草以前也觉得这样最好。
sentences.english_helper: Weed used to think that this was best too.

sentences.chinese: 名字不重要。
sentences.english_helper: The name was not important.

sentences.chinese: 只要能卖出去，就够了。
sentences.english_helper: As long as things sold, that was enough.

sentences.chinese: 可是有一天，一个客人买完东西以后，没有马上走。
sentences.english_helper: But one day, after buying something, a customer does not leave right away.

sentences.chinese: 客人把东西收好以后，抬头问他：“这个是谁做的？”
sentences.english_helper: After putting the item away, the customer looks up and asks, 'Who made this?'

sentences.chinese: 杂草先说：“我。”
sentences.english_helper: Weed first says, 'Me.'

sentences.chinese: 客人又问：“那你叫什么名字？”
sentences.english_helper: The customer asks again, 'Then what is your name?'

sentences.chinese: 这一句很简单。
sentences.english_helper: That sentence is very simple.

sentences.chinese: 可是杂草却停了一下。
sentences.english_helper: But Weed pauses for a moment.

sentences.chinese: 因为他从前很少想这件事。
sentences.english_helper: Because before, he rarely thought about this.

sentences.chinese: 在他心里，名字像是多出来的东西。
sentences.english_helper: In his mind, a name feels like something extra.

sentences.chinese: 东西能不能站住，才是真的。
sentences.english_helper: Whether the item can stand on its own is what is real.

sentences.chinese: 可是现在，他忽然觉得，也许不只是这样。
sentences.english_helper: But now, he suddenly feels maybe it is not only that.

sentences.chinese: 如果别人问名字，不只是因为好奇。
sentences.english_helper: If someone asks a name, it is not only because of curiosity.

sentences.chinese: 也许是因为对方想记住是谁做的。
sentences.english_helper: Maybe it is also because the person wants to remember who made it.

sentences.chinese: 想到这里，杂草说出了自己的名字。
sentences.english_helper: Thinking this, Weed says his name aloud.

sentences.chinese: 客人点了点头。
sentences.english_helper: The customer nods.

sentences.chinese: 客人说：“如果我朋友喜欢，我会再来找你。”
sentences.english_helper: The customer says, 'If my friend likes it, I'll come find you again.'

sentences.chinese: 客人走了以后，杂草站了很久。
sentences.english_helper: After the customer leaves, Weed stands there for a long time.

sentences.chinese: 市场里的人还是很多。
sentences.english_helper: There are still many people in the market.

sentences.chinese: 声音也还是一样乱。
sentences.english_helper: The noise is still just as messy.

sentences.chinese: 可是杂草心里却多了一件新的事。
sentences.english_helper: But inside Weed, there is one new thought.

sentences.chinese: 原来把名字留在东西后面，不只是为了出名。
sentences.english_helper: Leaving a name behind a piece is not only for becoming famous.

sentences.chinese: 也是在说：这个东西，我认。
sentences.english_helper: It is also saying: I acknowledge this piece as mine.

sentences.chinese: 这个好也好，不好也好，我都负责。
sentences.english_helper: Whether it is good or not, I take responsibility for it.

sentences.chinese: 那一天以后，杂草第一次认真想，自己的名字也许会慢慢传开。
sentences.english_helper: After that day, for the first time Weed seriously thinks that his name may slowly begin to spread.

stories.title: 做给自己的作品
stories.source_range: inspired by early non-sale practice and maker-purpose scenes

sentences.chinese: 杂草最近做的东西，大部分都拿去卖。
sentences.english_helper: Most of the things Weed has made lately have been taken to sell.

sentences.chinese: 因为在他心里，东西如果不能马上变成钱，就很难安心。
sentences.english_helper: Because in his mind, if something cannot immediately turn into money, it is hard to feel at ease.

sentences.chinese: 这也是他一直以来最习惯的想法。
sentences.english_helper: This is also the way of thinking he has been most used to all along.

sentences.chinese: 可是那一天，他忽然不想这样。
sentences.english_helper: But that day, he suddenly does not want to do that.

sentences.chinese: 他想做一件不卖的作品。
sentences.english_helper: He wants to make one piece that he will not sell.

sentences.chinese: 连他自己也觉得这个想法有一点奇怪。
sentences.english_helper: Even he himself thinks this idea is a little strange.

sentences.chinese: 因为做了不卖，好像就没有目的。
sentences.english_helper: Because if he makes something and does not sell it, it seems to have no purpose.

sentences.chinese: 没有目的，就像在浪费时间。
sentences.english_helper: And without a purpose, it feels like wasting time.

sentences.chinese: 可是这个念头一直没有走。
sentences.english_helper: But this thought does not leave.

sentences.chinese: 最后，杂草还是坐下来做了。
sentences.english_helper: In the end, Weed still sits down and makes it.

sentences.chinese: 这一次，他没有去想谁会买。
sentences.english_helper: This time, he does not think about who will buy it.

sentences.chinese: 也没有去想能卖多少钱。
sentences.english_helper: He also does not think about how much it can sell for.

sentences.chinese: 他只想试一个自己还不会的样子。
sentences.english_helper: He only wants to try a form he still does not know how to make.

sentences.chinese: 开始的时候，他还是有一点不习惯。
sentences.english_helper: At the beginning, he still feels a little unaccustomed.

sentences.chinese: 每做一会儿，脑子里就会冒出一个声音。
sentences.english_helper: Every so often while working, a voice rises in his head.

sentences.chinese: 这个能卖吗？
sentences.english_helper: Can this sell?

sentences.chinese: 这个值得吗？
sentences.english_helper: Is this worth it?

sentences.chinese: 杂草每次听见这个声音，都把它压下去。
sentences.english_helper: Each time Weed hears that voice, he presses it down.

sentences.chinese: 然后继续做。
sentences.english_helper: Then he keeps working.

sentences.chinese: 慢慢地，他发现自己的手比平常更放松。
sentences.english_helper: Slowly, he notices that his hands are more relaxed than usual.

sentences.chinese: 眼睛也看得更细。
sentences.english_helper: His eyes also see more carefully.

sentences.chinese: 因为这一次，没有人站在他的心里催他快一点。
sentences.english_helper: Because this time, no one is standing inside his heart urging him to go faster.

sentences.chinese: 做完以后，那件作品也许不是他最好的。
sentences.english_helper: When it is finished, that piece may not be his best.

sentences.chinese: 可是杂草看着它，心里有一种很少见的平静。
sentences.english_helper: But as Weed looks at it, he feels a kind of peace he rarely experiences.

sentences.chinese: 他没有把它拿去市场。
sentences.english_helper: He does not take it to the market.

sentences.chinese: 也没有急着找人看。
sentences.english_helper: Nor does he hurry to show it to anyone.

sentences.chinese: 他只是把它留着，放在自己看得见的地方。
sentences.english_helper: He simply keeps it and places it where he can see it.

sentences.chinese: 那一刻他终于明白，不是每一件作品都要先变成钱。
sentences.english_helper: At that moment he finally understands that not every piece must first turn into money.

sentences.chinese: 有的作品，是拿来卖的。
sentences.english_helper: Some pieces are for selling.

sentences.chinese: 有的作品，是拿来让自己再往前走一点的。
sentences.english_helper: Some pieces are for helping himself move a little farther forward.
